payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the new information says Sam from Goldman has no children. Do not treat either as resolved without clarification or an explicit correction.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children
New: Sam from Goldman has no children

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same ambiguous entity, 'Sam from Goldman'; the new claim directly conflicts with the existing child-count fact.

details: Identified a direct contradiction about the same entity's number of children.
No durable memory was committed because the conflict is unresolved.

repair_options: Ask whether the new statement is intended to correct the existing memory.
If confirmed as a correction, mark the prior 'two children' memory as superseded and store 'Sam from Goldman has no children.'
If not a correction, determine whether there are two different people named Sam associated with Goldman.
